description: Analyze as-built survey data for ADA compliance in TopoCal. You are certifying pedestrian curb ramps where the ADA mandates a maximum running slope of 8.33% and a maximum cross slope of 2.00%. Using the dataset at 'C:\workspace\data\intersection_asbuilt.xyz', evaluate Ramp A (Points 101-104), Ramp B (Points 105-108), and Ramp C (Points 109-112). A ramp passes only if all running slopes (TL to BL, TR to BR) are <= 8.33% and all cross slopes (TL to TR, BL to BR) are <= 2.00%. Annotate the CAD drawing with polylines connecting the corners and 'PASS' or 'FAIL' text for each ramp. Export the final drawing to 'C:\workspace\data\ada_drawing.dxf' and save a text report listing the status of each ramp to 'C:\workspace\data\ada_report.txt'.
